summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for navbar simplification and services pages redesign. All features tested and verified successfully.
passed_tests: Navbar simplified to 4 items: Layanan, Portfolio, Produk, Artikel
Removed items (Kontak, Teknologi, Tim, Karier) not present in desktop navbar
Portfolio dropdown shows 'All Projects' and 'Case Studies' options
Services page loads with section-based layout (not grid)
All 6 category filter pills functional: Semua, Engineering, Platform, AI & Data, Design, Advisory
Each service section displays icon, title, summary, feature bullets
Lihat Detail button navigates to service detail page
Service detail page shows hero gradient section with icon, category, title
Kemampuan Utama section displays 6 feature cards
Cocok Untuk section displays 3 use case items
Hasil Terkait section displays 3 related case cards
